name: Shandong Homey Aquatic Development Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shandong Homey Aquatic Development Co.,Ltd. operates in marine food industry in China. The company offers sea cucumbers, oysters, kelps, shrimps, crabs, sea breams, abalones, prawns, clams, loach products, and other sea treasures. It also sells its products through approximately 300 retail chain stores and e-commerce platforms. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Rongcheng, China.
